# Affordable Dental of OKC

Affordable Dental and Orthodontics is a family-focused dental practice in Oklahoma City, OK, led by Dr. Jason Chang, a University of Oklahoma graduate with a Doctor of Dental Surgery degree. Opened in 2015, the practice prides itself on using the latest dental technology to serve patients across OKC, Norman, Newcastle, and surrounding areas. Dr. Chang is deeply community-oriented, serving as a church deacon, music ministry leader, and a long-time dental missionary in Mongolia, bringing a compassionate, personal touch to patient care. The practice offers a comprehensive range of dental services from routine checkups to full smile makeovers.

Source: https://example.com

---

# Affordable, Modern Family Dental Care in OKC


### Comprehensive dentistry and orthodontic-style smile support with advanced technology and compassionate treatment for patients of all ages.


Proudly serving Oklahoma City, Norman, Newcastle, and surrounding communities.


Contact Us
Explore Services















## Complete Dental Care for the Whole Family


At Affordable Dental of OKC, we believe everyone deserves a healthy, confident smile. From preventive dentistry near me to advanced cosmetic and restorative treatments, our team provides gentle, personalized care using the latest technology. Whether you need a routine checkup or a full smile makeover, we're here for your family every step of the way.











### Preventive Dentistry


Routine cleanings, exams, and oral cancer screenings to keep your smile healthy and catch issues early.









### Teeth Whitening


Professional in-office and take-home whitening treatments to brighten your smile by several shades safely.









### Veneers


Custom-crafted porcelain veneers for a natural-looking smile transformation and lasting confidence.









### Crowns


Durable, tooth-colored crowns that restore strength, function, and aesthetics to damaged teeth.









### Root Canals


Gentle, modern root canal therapy to relieve pain and save your natural tooth from extraction.









### Fillings


Tooth-colored composite fillings that blend seamlessly and provide long-lasting protection against decay.









### Dentures


Comfortable, natural-looking full and partial dentures designed to restore your smile and chewing function.









### Periodontal & Oral Surgery


Gum disease treatment and minor surgical procedures to maintain healthy supporting structures for your teeth.






Schedule Your Appointment














## Meet Dr. Jason Chang


Since opening our doors in 2015, Affordable Dental and Orthodontics has been dedicated to providing exceptional dental care to families across Oklahoma City, Norman, Newcastle, and the surrounding communities. A proud graduate of the University of Oklahoma with a Doctor of Dental Surgery degree, Dr. Chang combines advanced clinical expertise with a genuine love for his Oklahoma neighbors.










### Family-Focused Care


We use the latest dental technology to ensure every visit is comfortable, efficient, and effective for patients of all ages.









### Mission-Driven Compassion


Beyond the practice, Dr. Chang serves as a church deacon, music ministry leader, and has led annual dental mission trips to Mongolia for over a decade.





Learn More About Us  →

Working Professional

Senior Patient





Proudly serving families in Oklahoma City, Norman, and Newcastle from our office at 4 SE 59th St.

# Comprehensive Dental Services for Your Whole Family


At Affordable Dental of OKC, we combine advanced technology with a gentle, patient-first approach to deliver preventive, cosmetic, restorative, and minor surgical care. From routine checkups to full smile makeovers, every treatment is personalized for children, adults, and seniors across Oklahoma City, Norman, Newcastle, and surrounding areas.









### Preventive Dentistry


Routine exams, cleanings, digital X-rays, and oral cancer screenings to keep your smile healthy year after year. We focus on early detection and gentle education so every visit feels comfortable and productive.








### Cosmetic Dentistry


Professional whitening, veneers, and complete smile makeovers designed to boost your confidence. Whether you're preparing for a special occasion or simply want to love your reflection, our cosmetic solutions are tailored to you.








### Restorative & Surgical Care


Fillings, crowns, bridges, root canals, dentures, periodontal treatment, and minor oral surgery. We restore function and aesthetics with precision, using the latest dental technology to ensure lasting results.







We proudly offer personalized treatment plans for every stage of life — from a child's first checkup to senior denture care. Our team is dedicated to making quality dentistry accessible and affordable for all Oklahoma families.









## Our Services


Comprehensive dental care for the entire family, from routine checkups to complete smile transformations.












### Checkups & Exams


Thorough dental evaluations using the latest diagnostic technology to catch issues early and keep your smile healthy.

Learn more  →









### Preventive Dentistry


Professional cleanings, fluoride treatments, and sealants to protect your teeth and prevent decay before it starts.

Learn more  →









### Emergency Evaluations


Prompt, compassionate care when you need it most. We prioritize dental emergencies to relieve pain and restore your smile quickly.

Learn more  →









### Fillings & Crowns


Tooth-colored restorations that blend seamlessly with your natural teeth, repairing decay and strengthening damaged teeth.

Learn more  →









### Root Canals


Gentle, effective treatment to save infected teeth and relieve discomfort, using advanced techniques for a comfortable experience.

Learn more  →









### Teeth Whitening


Professional whitening treatments that deliver dramatic, long-lasting results — brighten your smile by several shades in one visit.

Learn more  →









### Veneers


Custom-crafted porcelain veneers that transform the shape, color, and alignment of your teeth for a stunning, natural-looking smile.

Learn more  →









### Dentures


Comfortable, natural-looking full and partial dentures designed to restore function and confidence for patients with missing teeth.

Learn more  →









### Periodontal Treatment


Comprehensive gum care including deep cleanings and maintenance to treat gum disease and protect your overall oral health.

Learn more  →









### Minor Oral Surgery


Skilled, gentle surgical procedures including extractions and other minor treatments performed with your comfort in mind.

Learn more  →









### Smile Makeovers


Complete smile transformations combining cosmetic and restorative treatments tailored to your unique facial features and goals.

Learn more  →









### Family Dentistry


Caring for smiles of all ages — from toddlers to grandparents — with a gentle approach that makes every visit a positive experience.

Learn more  →












Family Care

## Preventive Dentistry & Routine Checkups


Protecting your family's smiles starts with consistent, gentle preventive care. At Affordable Dental of OKC, we believe that routine checkups are the foundation of lifelong oral health. Our team, led by Dr. Jason Chang, uses the latest dental technology to catch small issues before they become big problems, ensuring every visit is comfortable and thorough.


- Comprehensive dental exams & digital X-rays

- Gentle professional cleanings for all ages

- Sealants & fluoride treatments for cavity prevention


Schedule a Checkup









Smile Design

## Cosmetic & Confidence-Focused Smile Makeovers


Your smile is one of the first things people notice. Our cosmetic dentistry services are designed to give you the confidence that comes with a bright, beautiful smile. From professional whitening to custom veneers, we combine artistry with advanced dental technology to create natural-looking results that reflect your personality.


- Professional teeth whitening for a radiant smile

- Custom porcelain veneers for a flawless look

- Complete smile makeovers tailored to you


Explore Cosmetic Options









Restorative Health

## Restorative & Health-Focused Dental Treatments


When dental issues arise, restoring your oral health becomes our top priority. Dr. Chang and our skilled team provide advanced restorative treatments that not only repair damage but also preserve your natural teeth whenever possible. We're here to help you chew, speak, and smile comfortably again with compassionate, personalized care.


- Crowns & bridges for durable tooth restoration

- Gentle root canal therapy to save natural teeth

- Full & partial dentures for complete smile restoration

- Periodontal care for healthy gums & bone support


Restore Your Smile













Modern Dentistry

## Advanced Technology for a Comfortable, Precise Experience


We invest in the latest dental technology to provide efficient diagnostics and precise treatment planning, ensuring every visit is as comfortable as possible for OKC-area families.








Digital X-Rays — Reduced radiation, instant imaging, and enhanced diagnostic clarity.







Intraoral Cameras — See what we see with high-definition images that help you understand your treatment.







Soft-Tissue Laser Dentistry — Minimally invasive procedures with less discomfort and faster healing.







CAD/CAM Same-Day Crowns — Custom-milled restorations designed and placed in a single appointment.




Schedule Your Visit










Trusted Since 2015








## Let's Discuss Your Personalized Treatment Plan


At Affordable Dental of OKC, we believe everyone deserves a healthy, confident smile. Dr. Jason Chang and our caring team provide personal, affordable, family-centered care using the latest dental technology. Whether you need a routine checkup, cosmetic dentistry, or a complete smile makeover, we're here to listen and create a plan that fits your life and budget.

Contact Our Office

Proudly serving patients from Oklahoma City, Norman, Newcastle, and surrounding communities.

## Meet Dr. Jason Chang: Compassionate Care Rooted in Community — Affordable Dental of OKC

URL: https://example.com/about
Description: Experience dentistry with heart. Dr. Jason Chang combines cutting-edge technology with a personal touch, serving OKC families and leading dental missions abroad. Learn his story today!

Meet Dr. Jason Chang: Compassionate Care Rooted in Community — Affordable Dental of OKC






























Skip to main content












- Home
- Services
- About Us


Contact










# About Affordable Dental & Orthodontics


Affordable Dental and Orthodontics is your choice dentistry for your entire family. We're excited to provide dental care to the Oklahoma City, Norman, and surrounding areas. Our practice is built on a foundation of trust, compassion, and clinical excellence, ensuring every patient feels at home from the moment they walk through our doors.


Led by Dr. Jason Chang, a proud Oklahoman and dedicated community servant, we combine the latest dental technology with a warm, personal touch. Whether you need a routine checkup, advanced restorative work, or a complete smile makeover, our team is here to help you and your loved ones achieve a lifetime of healthy, beautiful smiles.
















Our Practice



## Caring for Oklahoma Families Since 2015



At Affordable Dental and Orthodontics, we believe that a healthy smile is the foundation of a happy life. Since opening our doors in 2015, our mission has been to provide exceptional, affordable dental care to the Oklahoma City, Norman, Newcastle, and surrounding communities. Led by Dr. Jason Chang, a proud University of Oklahoma graduate, our practice combines the latest dental technology with genuine, compassionate care.


Our highly trained staff is dedicated to making every visit comfortable and effective. We specialize in preventive dentistry near me, ensuring that routine checkups and cleanings keep your family’s smiles bright and healthy year after year. Beyond prevention, we offer a comprehensive range of services including cosmetic dentistry veneers, professional whitening, crowns, root canals, fillings, dentures, periodontal treatment, and minor oral surgery.








### A New Chapter at 4 SE 59th St


We are thrilled to welcome you to our state-of-the-art facility on SE 59th Street. This new location allows us to serve you better with expanded operatories, advanced imaging technology, and a warm, family-friendly environment designed for your comfort.





From a child’s first dental visit to full smile makeovers for adults, we tailor every treatment plan to your unique needs. Our practice is built on trust, integrity, and a deep commitment to giving back—both locally and globally through Dr. Chang’s annual dental mission work in Mongolia.


Schedule Your Visit
















Serving OKC with Heart






















## Dr. Jason Chang


First, I would like to thank you for taking the time to explore our website. We opened our offices in 2015 and are excited to provide dental care to the Norman, Newcastle, and surrounding areas.


I was born and raised in Lawton, OK, and continued my education at the University of Oklahoma, where I completed my Bachelor of Science in Biochemistry and Doctor of Dental Surgery Degree. Oklahoma is the only home I have known, and I look forward to continuing to give back to this great community.


One of my other passions, besides dentistry, is doing mission work. I have been doing mission work in Mongolia every year for the past 10 years, bringing dental care and compassion to communities in need. This experience has shaped my approach to patient care — treating every person who walks through our doors like family.


At Affordable Dental and Orthodontics, we believe that quality dental care should be accessible to everyone. Whether you need routine preventive dentistry near me or a complete smile makeover, our team is here to serve you with the latest technology and a gentle touch.








Beyond the Practice

## Serving with Heart & Purpose


Dr. Jason Chang's commitment to compassion extends far beyond the dental chair — into global missions, local ministry, and the Oklahoma community he proudly calls home.











### Mongolia Mission Work


For over a decade, Dr. Chang has traveled annually to Mongolia, providing free dental treatment to underserved communities. His mission trips bring not only essential preventive dentistry near me, but also deep compassion and hope to families who otherwise lack access to care. Each journey reflects his belief that a healthy smile can restore dignity and open doors to brighter futures.









### Faith & Music Ministry


As a dedicated deacon and music ministry leader at Morning Light United Methodist Church, Dr. Chang invests his time nurturing spiritual growth and community connection in Oklahoma City. Whether organizing outreach events or leading worship, his service is rooted in the same gentle, patient-centered philosophy that defines his dental practice — listening first, caring always.









### Oklahoma Roots & Passions


Born and raised in Lawton, Dr. Chang is a proud Oklahoman through and through. When he is not caring for patients, you will likely find him casting a line at a local fishing spot, cheering courtside for the OKC Thunder, or celebrating a Sooners victory. His love for family, sports, and the outdoors keeps him grounded in the very community he serves every day.

















## Visit Our Oklahoma City Dental Office


We warmly welcome families from OKC, Norman, Newcastle, and all surrounding communities to experience compassionate, affordable dental care in a comfortable, modern environment. Our team is ready to help you achieve a healthy, confident smile.









### Affordable Dental & Orthodontics

## Privacy Policy

Description: Our privacy policy - how we collect, use, and protect your information

Privacy Policy




























- Home

Contact








# Privacy Policy



Last Updated:  6/7/2026



Affordable Dental of OKC ("Company", "we", "our") is committed to protecting your privacy. This privacy policy explains how we collect, use and protect your information when you use our website [business_website] ("Service").


## 1. Information Collection


We may collect the following types of information:


- Personal Information: Name, email address, phone number and address

- Technical Information: IP address, browser type, operating system and website usage data

- Cookies: Information stored on your computer to improve user experience




## 2. Use of Information


We use the collected information for the following purposes:


- Providing requested services

- Improving service and user experience

- Contacting you regarding our services

- Compliance with legal requirements




## 3. Information Sharing


We do not sell, rent or share your personal information with third parties, except in the following cases:


- With your explicit consent

- When required by law

- To protect our rights or user safety

- With service providers who assist in operating the service (under confidentiality agreements)




## 4. User Rights


In accordance with Israeli Privacy Protection Law 1981, you have the following rights:


- Right to access personal information stored about you

- Right to correct inaccurate or incomplete information

- Right to delete personal information in certain circumstances

- Right to object to information processing for marketing purposes

- Right to file a complaint with the Data Protection Authority




## 5. Cookies


Our website uses cookies to improve user experience. You can manage cookies through your browser settings. Disabling cookies may affect website functionality.


## 6. Information Security


We implement reasonable security measures to protect your information, including encryption, firewalls and restricted access control. However, no transmission or storage method is 100% secure.


## 7. Policy Changes


We may update this privacy policy from time to time. Material changes will be posted on the website with 30 days advance notice.



## 8. Contact Information


For questions or requests regarding this privacy policy, please contact us:


- Company: Affordable Dental of OKC

- Email: [business_email]

- Phone: [business_phone]

- Address: [business_address]



Data Protection Authority: For complaints, you may contact the Data Protection Authority at the Ministry of Justice

## Accessibility Statement

URL: https://example.com/accessibility
Description: Our accessibility statement - our commitment to digital accessibility

Accessibility Statement




























- Home
- Services
- About Us


Contact








# Accessibility Statement



Last updated:  June 7, 2026



Affordable Dental of OKC is committed to making our services accessible to all users. We strive to implement the Israeli Standard (TI 5568) based on WCAG 2.1 Level AA guidelines.


Accessibility Level: AA (Israeli Standard TI 5568)



## 1. Accessibility Policy


We believe in equal rights and the right of every person to receive information and services independently and equally. This website was designed and built with special emphasis on accessibility for people with disabilities.


## 2. Accessibility Arrangements on the Site


- Keyboard navigation support

- Screen reader compatibility

- Appropriate color contrast

- Flexible and scalable font sizes

- Descriptive image alt text

- Hierarchical heading structure

- Clear and descriptive links

- Support for 200% zoom without content loss





### WCAG 2.1 Compliance


The website complies with WCAG 2.1 Level AA, which includes:


- Perceivable: Information is presented in ways users can perceive

- Operable: Interface components are operable

- Understandable: Information and user interface are understandable

- Robust: Content can be interpreted by a variety of technologies





## 3. Supported Assistive Technologies


- NVDA (Windows)

- JAWS (Windows)

- VoiceOver (Mac/iOS)

- TalkBack (Android)

- Dragon NaturallySpeaking

- Switch navigation




## 4. Accessibility Testing


The website has been tested using:


- Automated accessibility testing tools

- Manual testing with screen readers

- Keyboard-only navigation

- Color contrast verification

- Testing with users with disabilities




## 5. Continuous Improvements


We are continuously working to improve the accessibility of our website and update it according to technological developments and user feedback.



## 6. Contact and Feedback


If you encounter an accessibility issue on the site or need assistance, please contact us:


- Company: Affordable Dental of OKC

- Email: [business_email]

- Phone: [business_phone]



Response time: We respond to accessibility inquiries within 3 business days and work to resolve issues within 10 business days.

## Terms & Conditions

URL: https://example.com/terms
Description: Terms of service - user rights and obligations

Terms & Conditions




























- Home
- Services
- About Us


Contact








# Terms of Use



Last updated:  June 7, 2026



Use of this site constitutes agreement to the terms outlined below. Please read carefully before use.



## 1. Definitions


- "Company" - Affordable Dental of OKC

- "User" - Anyone who browses or uses the site

- "Services" - Dentistry provided through the site




## 2. Description of Services


Affordable Dental of OKC provides Dentistry through the site. The services are subject to the terms detailed in this document and may change from time to time.


## 3. Terms of Use


Use of the site is conditional on compliance with the following terms:


- Use of the site for lawful purposes only

- No interference with site operations or other users

- No uploading of offensive, illegal, or harmful content

- Respect for copyright and intellectual property rights

- No actions that may compromise site security




## 4. User Obligations


- Providing accurate and truthful information during registration or ordering

- Maintaining confidentiality of account access details

- Immediate notification of any unauthorized account use

- Updating personal information as needed




## 5. Payment and Refund Policy


If services include payment:


- Payments are processed through secure and encrypted systems

- Prices include applicable taxes as required by law

- Right to cancel will be in accordance with consumer protection laws

- Refunds will be processed within 14 business days of cancellation approval




## 6. Limitation of Liability


Services are provided "as is" without warranty of any kind. The Company will not be liable for indirect, consequential, or special damages arising from use of the site, except where required by law.


## 7. Copyright and Intellectual Property


All content on the site, including text, images, design, and code, is protected by copyright owned by Affordable Dental of OKC. Reproduction, distribution, or commercial use of content is prohibited without written permission.


## 8. Privacy


Collection and use of personal information is subject to our Privacy Policy. Use of the site constitutes agreement to the Privacy Policy as detailed separately.


## 9. Changes to Terms of Use


The Company may change these terms of use at any time. Material changes will be posted on the site with 30 days advance notice. Continued use after changes constitutes agreement to the new terms.


## 10. Service Termination


The Company may suspend or limit service at any time, including in cases of terms of use violations. In case of service termination, relevant provisions will remain in effect.


## 11. Governing Law and Dispute Resolution


These terms of use are governed by applicable laws. Any disputes will be resolved in accordance with local jurisdiction, with preference given to arbitration or mediation where possible.


## 12. General Provisions


- If any portion of the terms is found invalid, remaining terms will remain in effect

- Non-enforcement of a right will not be considered a waiver

- These terms of use constitute the entire agreement between the parties





## 13. Contact Information


For questions or clarifications regarding the terms of use:


- Company: Affordable Dental of OKC

- Email: [business_email]

- Phone: [business_phone]

- Address: [business_address]
